title: The Second Meeting
summary: The duel promised at the princes' tournament arrives with curses ripening, a chariot wheel sinking, and one brother killing another without knowing his name.

perspectives.heading: A lifetime reaches its appointed field
perspectives.text: His armor is gone, his single-use spear spent, and the knowledge of his teacher fails when the earth takes the wheel. He still asks the law of duels to remember him.

perspectives.heading: The enemy he has measured since boyhood
perspectives.text: Arjuna sees the rival from the tournament, the voice from the dice hall, and the warrior behind Abhimanyu's death. He does not see his elder brother.

perspectives.heading: The field's memory speaks
perspectives.text: Krishna answers Karna's appeal by naming every earlier moment when law was denied to the helpless, then tells Arjuna that hesitation has run out.

perspectives.heading: A reluctant charioteer at the last wheel
perspectives.text: Shalya has spent the day wounding Karna with words while holding his reins. At the decisive instant, counsel, curses, and the earth leave the commander exposed.

perspectives.heading: The knowledge absent from the battlefield
perspectives.text: The mother who asked Karna to change sides knows that either outcome kills one of her sons. Her secret turns victory into fratricide only after the pyres are counted.
